note: Source of truth for the ADR knowledge graph (ADR-0109). Views are GENERATED into MAP.md by `task adr:index`; `task adr:index:check` fails the build if MAP.md is stale or an ADR is untagged. When you add an ADR, add its number to >=1 subsystem below (coverage is enforced). Edit THIS file, never MAP.md. Multi-membership is expected for cross-cutting ADRs — that adjacency is the whole point (it is how a new design finds prior art it must reconcile with).

foundation.title: Foundation — charter authority, control plane, language/tooling, monorepo, meta-process

graph-model.title: Graph model — Entity/Facet/Relation/Contract primitives, projection & liveness

plugin-port.title: Sovereign plugin port — the dark-matter substrate, transports, runtime registry

connectors.title: Connectors & Syncers — SoR ingest breadth, the Syncer SDK, adopt/AWX-import

actuators.title: Actuators — execution engines (opentofu, helm, mcp, cert-issuer reconcile)

orchestration.title: Orchestration — Triggers, Workflows/Gates, Steps, Runs, Actions, notifications

estate-as-code.title: Estate-as-Code — CaC declarations, environments, composition, the estate CLI

intent-compiler.title: Intent compiler — Intent/Assignment/Blueprint/Baseline compile to Runs

provisioning.title: Provisioning — declare & build infra (Intent -> builder -> machines), provision->configure

capability-framework.title: Capability framework — provides/requires, verification, resolve-inject vs enablement-gate, providers

credentials-secrets.title: Credentials & secrets (§2.5) — brokering, the SecretBroker port, KV, KeyCustodian

certificates-pki.title: Certificates & PKI — cert lifecycle as a reconcile Actuator, OpenBao PKI

state-artifacts.title: Tool state & artifacts — state backend, evidence store, object storage, statestore/artifactstore

authz-identity.title: Authorization & identity — OpenFGA, Principal, SCIM, workload identity

policy-governance.title: Policy & governance — the PDP port, typed Controls, admission PEPs, obligations

findings-drift.title: Findings & drift — Baselines, Findings, compliance packs, drift/GC

ui.title: UI — React shell, schema-driven rendering, Views, descent, the first-party client

api-surface.title: API surface — OpenAPI /api/v1, the AWX /api/v2 façade, the platform MCP server

substrate-ops.title: Substrate & ops — HA/DR, Cells/multi-region, Sites, deploy, bootstrap, upgrade, observability, dev backends

audit-telemetry.title: Audit & telemetry — the one audit stream, SIEM forwarder, decision recording, OpenTelemetry
